metadata.title: FocusNow - AI-Powered Focus Tracking
metadata.description: Privacy-first AI-powered desktop focus tracking app. Understand your productivity patterns without compromising your data.
metadata.keywords: focus tracking, productivity, AI, privacy, time tracking, desktop app

hero.title: Understand Your Focus,
hero.description: FocusNow tracks your desktop activity with AI-powered insights — all processed locally on your device. No cloud uploads, no surveillance. Just clarity.

features.title: Everything You Need to
features.description: Powerful features designed to help you understand and improve your productivity without sacrificing your privacy.

ai.title: AI-Powered Insights
ai.description: Smart categorization and productivity scoring powered by local AI. Understand what drives your focus.

focus.title: Focus Sessions
focus.description: Track deep work sessions with customizable timers. See your productive streaks and patterns.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: All data stays on your device. No cloud uploads, no tracking servers. Your activity is yours alone.

analytics.title: Detailed Analytics
analytics.description: Beautiful charts and reports showing your daily, weekly, and monthly productivity trends.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform
crossPlatform.description: Available on macOS with Windows and Linux support coming soon. One experience everywhere.

distraction.title: Distraction Alerts
distraction.description: Get notified when you drift away from focused work. Gentle nudges to keep you on track.

privacySection.title: Your Privacy,
privacySection.description: Unlike other tracking tools, FocusNow processes everything locally. Here's what that means:

downloadCta.title: Ready to Take Control of
downloadCta.description: Download FocusNow for free and start understanding your productivity patterns today.
downloadCta.note: Free & open source. macOS only (for now).

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent
pricing.description: FocusNow is free to use. We believe productivity tools should be accessible to everyone.

free.title: Free
free.description: Everything you need to track and improve your focus.

about.title: About
about.description: FocusNow was born from a simple idea: you should be able to understand your productivity without giving up your privacy.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Most productivity tracking tools require you to upload your activity data to remote servers. We thought there had to be a better way. FocusNow processes everything locally on your device using AI, giving you powerful insights without compromising your privacy.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To help people understand and improve their focus through intelligent, privacy-respecting technology. We believe that personal productivity data should stay personal.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: FocusNow is built with privacy as a core principle. This policy explains how we handle your data.

collection.title: Data Collection
collection.content: FocusNow collects information about your active applications and window titles to provide focus tracking and productivity insights. All this data is processed and stored locally on your device.

storage.title: Data Storage
storage.content: All data collected by FocusNow is stored exclusively on your local device. We do not have servers that receive, store, or process your activity data.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.content: We do not share, sell, or transfer your activity data to any third parties. Your data never leaves your device.

analytics.title: Anonymous Analytics
analytics.content: We may collect anonymous usage statistics (such as app version, operating system) to improve FocusNow. This data contains no personal information or activity data.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at privacy@focusnow.app

versions.title: Initial Release
changes: Focus session tracking with customizable timers

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Tips, insights, and updates about FocusNow and productivity.
blog.noPosts: No blog posts yet. Check back soon!

footer.description: AI-powered focus tracking that respects your privacy.
